title: Simple Jetpack
description: This datapack adds a simple jetpack
body:
# **How to fly with the jetpack**
![1212](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4276942d78d7b6f07cf7b0bfa6736caa3ad717.png)
To fly you have to press shift The if you have another key assigned to the shift press it should work

# **Crafts:**
## **Anti-Falls 2000**
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf11d7c78459b03df06ea11c4131a35ee831e27d.png)

Use the reliable Anti-Falls 2000 for emergency situations have you run out of fuel? it's okay use the Anti-Falls 2000 and let him do the work for you

## **Jetpack**
![11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43938c5c08e5d259f06996f1aedf66982b4065d2.png)

What is better than using a backpack where fire comes out to get to a specific place? 
Don't forget the **coal blocks** Remember that each carbon block is about **26 seconds** approximately to be able to fly

## **Fuel**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d3d154ed3c3c79ef43d09fbdfac91412ada52c_0.webp)

Use the coal block as fuel remember to carry in the inventory in case of emergencies

## **FEEDBACK**
